subcodes.first_line: In this day the Tree of Knowledge, at the supreme pole of the Most Exalted Paradise, doth give utterance to this most glorious Word; on this Day the One Who conversed on Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز سدره دانش در قطب فردوس اعلی باین کلمه علیا ناطق امروز مکلم طور بر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for women, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
